methodology.clsObserver: installed AFTER browser_navigate completes (buffered:true captures DOMContentLoaded-onward entries)
methodology.note: CLS values corrected vs REG-2026-05-14-1138 where observer was installed pre-navigation (undercounting)

results.title: Home page CLS ≤0.1
results.note: Lato font-display:swap causes FOUT shifts. Same as prior run BUG_048b_001.

results.title: Catalog page CLS ≤0.1
results.note: Product grid images load after text, causing shifts.

results.title: PDP CLS ≤0.1
results.note: Product image carousel and variant picker shifts on load.

results.title: Cart page CLS ≤0.1
results.note: Cart item prices and totals shift when cart data loads.

results.title: Header spacing on 4px grid
results.note: All 5 header buttons on grid. Padding 4px/0px.

results.title: Catalog grid spacing on 4px grid
results.note: Product card padding all on grid.

results.title: Catalog product card top-edge alignment (first row)
results.note: First row cards: drift=0px after correcting to :nth-child(-n+4) scope. Prior BUG_048b_002 was test artifact from multi-row measurement. RESOLVED.

results.title: Cart line item internal alignment (price vs stepper)
results.note: Qty stepper sits 16px above remove button and price within a single line item row. Real alignment defect.

results.title: No horizontal scroll on home
results.note: overflow=-14 at all breakpoints. Carousel slides correctly clipped.

results.title: No horizontal scroll on catalog
results.note: No horizontal scroll detected.

results.title: No horizontal scroll on PDP
results.note: No horizontal scroll detected.

results.title: No horizontal scroll on cart
results.note: No horizontal scroll detected.

results.title: No horizontal scroll on /account/orders
results.note: No horizontal scroll detected.

results.title: No horizontal scroll on /account/lists
results.note: No horizontal scroll detected.

results.title: No horizontal scroll on /company/members
results.note: No horizontal scroll detected.

results.title: No horizontal scroll on /company/info
results.note: No horizontal scroll detected.

results.title: Home page touch targets ≥44×44px at 375px
results.note: Nav hamburger, search icon, cart icon, account icon, language selector, currency selector all <44px at 375px. Systemic icon-button sizing issue.

results.title: Catalog page touch targets ≥44×44px at 375px
results.note: Filter chips, sort buttons, wishlist icons <44px at mobile. Same systemic issue as TGT-001.

results.title: Checkout page touch targets ≥44×44px at 375px
results.note: 5 undersized elements in shipping+payment sections. Place Order CTA meets minimum (314×44).

results.title: Theme toggle causes no layout shift
results.note: Dark class applied via CSS variable swap — zero layout shift on theme toggle.

results.title: Webfont CLS ≤0.1 (Lato font-display:swap)
results.note: Lato uses font-display:swap causing FOUT-induced layout shifts (5 entries, CLS=0.2994). Root cause shared with BUG_048b_001.

results.title: No horizontal scroll across viewport sweep 375→1920
results.note: No horizontal scroll at any breakpoint.

results.title: VcButton spacing on 4px grid (header + PDP)
results.note: 5 header buttons + 10 PDP buttons — all padding on 4px grid. pl/pr=16px, pt/pb=0px.

results.title: VcTable cell spacing on 4px grid
results.note: 66 th/td cells audited — all on grid (pt/pb=4px, pl/pr=16px).

results.title: VcTable row-height uniformity
results.note: 10 tbody rows, all 52px — drift=0.

results.title: VcTable sort-induced CLS
results.note: Sort click on Date column → CLS=0. In-place data re-render, no layout shift.

results.title: VcDialog open causes no main content shift
results.note: Filters dialog opens via popup-sidebar. CLS=0, table top unchanged (321px before and after).

results.title: VcDialog touch targets ≥44×44px at 375px
results.note: Filter dialog at 375px: checkboxes (vc-checkbox__input) h=20px, status chips (vc-popover__trigger) h=20px. Only close button (68×68) and section header (46px) meet minimum.

results.title: Ship-to popover causes no header shift
results.note: CLS=0.0174 (<0.1), header unchanged (top=0, height=40px both before and after).

results.title: Ship-to popover spacing on 4px grid + no mobile overflow
results.note: vc-input__container inside popover has 2px padding (off 4px grid; nearest valid value is 0px). No viewport overflow.

results.title: Account sidebar spacing + alignment
results.note: vc-menu-item__inner--size--md has pt/pb=10px (off 4px grid; nearest is 8px). 14 items affected. Left-edge drift=10px is by-design hierarchical indentation (xs vs md size variants) — not a bug.

results.title: Cart stepper update causes no sibling line item shift
results.note: Increase qty on first line item — sibling item shift=0px, CLS=0 (interaction-filtered).

results.title: /account/orders page CLS ≤0.1
results.note: 3 shift entries, total CLS=0.0472.

results.title: /account/lists page CLS ≤0.1
results.note: 3 shift entries, total CLS=0.0348.

results.title: /company/members page CLS ≤0.1
results.note: 4 shift entries, total CLS=0.0142.

results.title: /company/info page CLS ≤0.1
results.note: 5 shift entries, total CLS=0.0216.

BUG_048b_001.title: CLS exceeds 0.1 on 4 critical pages
BUG_048b_001.rootCause: Lato font-display:swap causes FOUT-induced layout shifts. Confirmed by LAYOUT-FONT-001 (CLS=0.2994 on home page load).

priorRun.note: Prior run under-counted due to pre-navigation observer install

BUG_048b_002.title: Catalog grid 14px alignment drift
BUG_048b_002.note: Prior run measured alignment across ALL product cards (multiple rows). Corrected test using first-row-only (:nth-child(-n+4)) shows drift=0px. Not a real defect.

BUG_048b_003.title: Systemic touch targets <44×44px at mobile
scope: Home page: 6 targets (nav icons, search, cart, account, language, currency)
Catalog page: 8 targets (filter chips, sort buttons, wishlist icons)
Checkout page (P0): 5 targets (Pickup/Shipping buttons h=38px, select-address 32×32, billing checkbox 20px)
Filters dialog: 17/19 targets (checkboxes h=20px, status chips h=20px)

BUG_048b_004.title: NEW: Cart line item internal alignment drift (ALN-002)
BUG_048b_004.detail: Qty stepper sits 16px above remove button and price within a single line item row (centerDrift=16px, tolerance=1px).

BUG_048b_005.title: NEW: Account sidebar nav padding off 4px grid
BUG_048b_005.detail: vc-menu-item__inner--size--md: pt/pb=10px (should be 8px or 12px). 14 items affected.

BUG_048b_006.title: NEW: Ship-to popover input container 2px padding
BUG_048b_006.detail: vc-input__container inside ship-to popover has 2px padding (off 4px grid).
